#                --output svg/Serif/uc/040F.svg \
#                --font <path>/pt-serif-expert_regular.ttf

fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200
fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ==== Box: U+040F
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 341 0 /uni040F
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+040F"
move 1400
